---
title: Accelerating Sparse DNN Models Without Hardware-Support via Tile-wise Sparsity
author:
- Cong Guo
- Bo Yang Hsueh
- Jingwen Leng
- Yuxian Qiu
- Yue Guan
- Zehuan Wang
- Xiaoying Jia
- Xipeng Li
- Minyi Guo
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work We Contributed to
topics:
- mlsys
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/sc20.pdf
talk_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/sc20-slides.pdf
code_source: https://github.com/clevercool/TileSparsity
journ: SC
year: 2020
contrib: Work We Contributed to
image: featured.png
pub_number: 40
---
